task.en: In System Settings → Lock Screen, set `Start Screen Saver when inactive` to `After 5 minutes`. (The inactivity delay must be 5 minutes.)

pre_command: defaults -currentHost write com.apple.screensaver idleTime -int 0; defaults write com.apple.screensaver idleTime -int 0; sleep 1
grading_command: killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; IT=$(defaults read com.apple.screensaver idleTime 2>/dev/null); IT2=$(defaults -currentHost read com.apple.screensaver idleTime 2>/dev/null); ( [ "$IT" = "300" ] || [ "$IT2" = "300" ] ) && echo True || echo False

killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; IT=$(defaults read com.apple.screensaver idleTime 2>/dev/null); IT2=$(defaults -currentHost read com.apple.screensaver idleTime 2>/dev/null); ( { [ -n "$IT" ] && [ "$IT" != "0" ]; } || { [ -n "$IT2" ] && [ "$IT2" != "0" ]; } ) && echo True || echo False
